root_text.an5.101:1.3: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saddho hoti, sīlavā hoti, bahussuto hoti, āraddhavīriyo hoti, paññavā hoti.
root_text.an5.101:2.1: Yaṁ, bhikkhave, assaddhassa sārajjaṁ hoti, saddhassa taṁ sārajjaṁ na hoti.
root_text.an5.101:3.1: Yaṁ, bhikkhave, dussīlassa sārajjaṁ hoti, sīlavato taṁ sārajjaṁ na hoti.
root_text.an5.101:4.1: Yaṁ, bhikkhave, appassutassa sārajjaṁ hoti, bahussutassa taṁ sārajjaṁ na hoti.
root_text.an5.101:5.1: Yaṁ, bhikkhave, kusītassa sārajjaṁ hoti, āraddhavīriyassa taṁ sārajjaṁ na hoti.
root_text.an5.101:6.1: Yaṁ, bhikkhave, duppaññassa sārajjaṁ hoti, paññavato taṁ sārajjaṁ na hoti.
root_text.an5.101:6.3: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca sekhavesārajjakaraṇā dhammā”ti.

translation_text.an5.101:1.1: “Mendicants, these five qualities make a trainee assured.
translation_text.an5.101:1.3: It’s when a mendicant is faithful, ethical, learned, energetic, and wise.
translation_text.an5.101:2.1: A person of faith doesn’t have the insecurities of someone who lacks faith.
translation_text.an5.101:2.2: So this quality makes a trainee assured.
translation_text.an5.101:3.1: An ethical person doesn’t have the insecurities of someone who is unethical.
translation_text.an5.101:3.2: So this quality makes a trainee assured.
translation_text.an5.101:4.1: A learned person doesn’t have the insecurities of a person of little learning.
translation_text.an5.101:4.2: So this quality makes a trainee assured.
translation_text.an5.101:5.1: An energetic person doesn’t have the insecurities of a lazy person.
translation_text.an5.101:5.2: So this quality makes a trainee assured.
translation_text.an5.101:6.1: A wise person doesn’t have the insecurities of someone who is witless.
translation_text.an5.101:6.2: So this quality makes a trainee assured.
translation_text.an5.101:6.3: These are the five qualities that make a trainee assured.”
